title: Alkermes — White Space
html:
Alkermes White-Space & BD Opportunity Map

Prepared for: Vinoth Kumar V (AP) / Sara Farina (SM) Last updated: April 30, 2026 Purpose: Identify untapped research opportunities across Alkermes' brand portfolio

1. Brand x Service Matrix

Legend

  • ✅ Active engagement
  • 🎯 High-priority opportunity (clear need, realistic entry path)
  • 🔵 Medium-priority opportunity (need exists, entry path less clear)
  • ⚪ Low-priority / defer
  • ➖ Not applicable

Psychiatry Portfolio (Lybalvi + Aristada)

Service Lybalvi Aristada
PET (Promotional Effectiveness) ✅ $339K —
SOV Tracker — ✅ Ongoing
SFTO (Sales Force Tactical Optimization) 🎯 $89.5K proposed ⚪
HCPP (HCP-Patient Conversations) 🎯 🔵
ATU (Awareness/Trial/Usage) 🔵 ⚪
Message Testing / Labs 🔵 ➖
Digital Channel Tracking 🔵 ⚪
Competitive Deep-Dive (Cobenfy) 🎯 ➖
Bipolar I Positioning Study 🎯 ➖

Addiction Medicine (Vivitrol)

Service Vivitrol
PET (Promotional Effectiveness) ✅ $117K
Generic Transition Study 🎯
Criminal Justice Channel Study 🔵
AUD Market Opportunity Study 🔵
HCPP (HCP-Patient Conversations) ⚪ (generic entry limits ROI)

Sleep Medicine (LUMRYZ — NEW)

Service LUMRYZ
PET (Promotional Effectiveness) 🎯
HCPP (HCP-Patient Conversations) 🔵
ATU (Awareness/Trial/Usage) 🔵
Competitive Intelligence (vs. Xywav/Xyrem) 🔵
Digital Channel Tracking ⚪

Matrix Priority Summary

Priority Count Brands
✅ Active 3 Lybalvi PET, Aristada SOV, Vivitrol PET
🎯 High priority 5 Lybalvi SFTO, Lybalvi HCPP, Lybalvi Cobenfy deep-dive, Lybalvi BPD positioning, Vivitrol generic transition, LUMRYZ PET
🔵 Medium priority 7 Various service expansions
⚪ Low priority 4 Aristada service expansion (mature brand)

2. Top White-Space Opportunities (Ranked)

Rank Brand Service Est. Revenue Entry Strategy Who to Pitch Timeline Rationale
1 Lybalvi SFTO $89,500 Already proposed John Fritch Immediate Natural extension of PET; already in pipeline
2 Lybalvi Cobenfy Competitive Deep-Dive $75-125K Leverage Cobenfy SoV data from PET as hook; propose deeper prescriber perception study John Fritch H1 2026 Cobenfy is the #1 competitive threat; Alkermes is actively tracking it; deeper intelligence has clear ROI
3 LUMRYZ PET (Introductory) $100-150K Map LUMRYZ commercial team → introductory meeting → propose PET vs. Xywav/Xyrem LUMRYZ commercial lead (TBD) H2 2026 New acquisition with zero research support; team building during integration
4 Lybalvi HCPP $100-150K Use SFTO or Cobenfy deep-dive as proof of value → propose HCPP for BPD prescribers or SZ switch scenarios John Fritch H2 2026 HCPP methodology untested with Alkermes; needs a proof-of-concept entry
5 Vivitrol Generic Transition Study $75-100K Propose ahead of Jan 2027 generic entry; position as one-time intelligence package for brand defense planning Kurt Stauble Q3-Q4 2026 Time-sensitive — must be proposed before client decides to cut Vivitrol research
6 Lybalvi Bipolar I Positioning Study $75-150K Contingent on Cobenfy BPD trial progression; propose if Phase 3 data emerges John Fritch 2027 Depends on Cobenfy BPD clinical timeline
7 LUMRYZ ATU / HCP Perception $75-100K Bundle with PET proposal; understand narcolepsy prescriber perceptions of LUMRYZ vs. Xywav/Xyrem LUMRYZ commercial lead (TBD) 2027 Lower urgency; integration needs to stabilize first

Revenue Summary of Top Opportunities

Opportunity Set Revenue Range Confidence
High confidence (SFTO + renewals) $90K HIGH — already proposed
Medium confidence (Cobenfy deep-dive + LUMRYZ PET + generic transition) $250-375K MEDIUM — clear need, entry path requires development
Lower confidence (HCPP + BPD positioning + LUMRYZ ATU) $250-400K LOW — new services, new contacts needed
Total addressable $590K-$865K

3. Competitive Displacement Strategy

Current Vendor Landscape (What We Know)

Dimension Detail
ZoomRx's position PET/SOV vendor to DAI
Other vendors Unknown — this is a critical intelligence gap
LUMRYZ legacy vendors Unknown — Avadel had its own vendor relationships

Action items:

  • Ask Sara Farina: who else does Alkermes use for market research?
  • Research Avadel's pre-acquisition vendor relationships (public RFP databases, LinkedIn)
  • Identify if any competitor has an HCPP-like offering to Alkermes

Potential Displacement Targets

Without vendor intelligence, we can only hypothesize:

  • If Kantar or IQVIA Consulting provides strategic research, ZoomRx's AI capabilities and HCPP methodology are the differentiators
  • If no vendor provides HCP-Patient conversation analysis, ZoomRx can create the category
  • If Avadel used a sleep medicine specialist vendor, ZoomRx needs to demonstrate cross-TA research capability

4. Revenue Bridge: Current → Target

Baseline Scenario (Maintain)

Engagement FY26E FY27E Notes
Lybalvi PET renewal $340K $340K High confidence — Cobenfy tracking is essential
Aristada SOV renewal $60K (est.) $60K Institutional; long-running
Vivitrol PET renewal $117K $0 Generic entry Jan 2027; likely final year
Baseline ~$517K ~$400K FY27 drops $117K from Vivitrol

Growth Scenario (Execute Top Opportunities)

Engagement FY26E FY27E Notes
Baseline $517K $400K Per above
+ SFTO (Lybalvi) $90K — One-time
+ Cobenfy deep-dive $100K — One-time or annual
+ LUMRYZ PET — $125K H2 2026 entry → FY27 full year
+ Generic transition study $85K — One-time, pre-Jan 2027
+ HCPP (Lybalvi) — $125K FY27 if proof-of-concept in FY26
Growth scenario ~$792K ~$650K

Key Insight

FY27 is the risk year: Vivitrol drops off ($117K), and growth must come from LUMRYZ entry and service expansion. Without deliberate action in H2 2026, the account contracts.

5. Entry Playbook — Brand by Brand

Lybalvi (Growth Engine)

The constraint: John Fritch controls research budget. All new Lybalvi work must go through DAI.

Entry path:

  1. SFTO conversion (already proposed, $89.5K) — proves value beyond PET
  2. Cobenfy competitive deep-dive — leverage PET SoV data as hook for deeper study
  3. HCPP — if either #1 or #2 succeeds, use as proof case for conversation-level research
  4. Bipolar I positioning — contingent on Cobenfy BPD clinical timeline

Vivitrol (Defend & Transition)

The constraint: Generic entry Jan 2027 means Alkermes is in harvest mode. New research investments will be limited.

Entry path:

  1. Renew PET for final year (FY2026) — straightforward
  2. Propose generic transition study (Q3-Q4 2026) — one-time, positioned as essential for brand defense planning
  3. Do not propose multi-year or high-investment studies — the economics don't support it

LUMRYZ (New Frontier)

The constraint: No contacts. No relationship with the sleep medicine team. Avadel integration is in Year 1.

Entry path:

  1. Map commercial team contacts through Sara Farina (Q2 2026)
  2. Research Avadel's legacy vendor relationships (Q2 2026)
  3. Propose introductory PET or HCP perception study (Q3-Q4 2026)
  4. Do not rush — premature outreach during integration chaos could backfire

Aristada (Maintain)

The constraint: Mature brand with contracting sales footprint. Alkermes is not investing in Aristada growth.

Entry path:

  1. Maintain SOV Tracker (institutional engagement)
  2. Do not propose major new Aristada studies — the brand is in maintenance mode
  3. Monitor for Uzedy's bipolar I expansion impact — if Aristada responds, research needs may emerge

6. Key People and How to Use Them

Person Role How to Leverage
John Fritch VP, DAI Decision maker for Lybalvi research. Pitch SFTO, Cobenfy deep-dive, HCPP through him.
Kurt Stauble Sr. Dir., MR & CI Decision maker for Vivitrol/Aristada research. Pitch generic transition study.
Sara Farina ZoomRx SM Day-to-day relationship. Use her to map LUMRYZ contacts and gather vendor intelligence.
LUMRYZ commercial lead TBD Must identify. Entry point for sleep medicine research.
Blair Jackson Incoming CEO (Aug 2026) Do not pitch directly. Monitor for signals on research investment priorities.

Appendix: Service Definitions (Quick Reference)

Service Description Typical SOW
PET Tracks promotional reach, frequency, share of voice across brands $100-350K/year
SOV Tracker Lighter-weight quarterly SOV monitoring $50-75K/year
SFTO Optimizes sales force detail delivery and targeting $75-100K one-time
HCPP Records and analyzes HCP-patient conversations for communication insights $75-150K/study
ATU Measures awareness, trial, and usage of brands among prescribers $75-125K/study
Message Testing Tests promotional message concepts with HCPs before deployment $50-100K/study
Digital Tracking Monitors digital/omnichannel promotional activity and engagement $50-100K/study
Competitive Deep-Dive Focused study on a specific competitive threat (e.g., Cobenfy) $75-150K/study

Next refresh: After Sara Farina debrief on vendor landscape and LUMRYZ contact mapping.

Accounts Hub | Home
